creator: araujobsdport@gmail.com
text:
Dear Artem,

I have some questions around sipp-devel.
We need sipp-devel in PORTS TREE? Why?
Is more common use is the stable version and not devel, unless you tell
me the reasons to add this sipp-devel in PORTS TREE.

As always, good work!


Thanks.

-- 
Marcelo Araujo            (__)
araujo@FreeBSD.org     \\\'',)
http://www.FreeBSD.org   \/  \ ^
Power To Server.         .\. /_)
